title: athlete-guardian — declared entitlements
description: Two entitlement keys. `athlete_multi_guardian` gates multi-guardian per athlete (Small tier locks to 1; Medium+ unlocks split-family support). `athlete_guardian_verification` gates the HR-verified workflow with signed-document upload (Enterprise-only).

entitlements.description: Enables >1 guardian per athlete for split-family scenarios. When off (Small default), the observer refuses AthleteGuardian.creating when another live guardian exists for the same (tenant, athlete). Medium tenants get up to 4 guardians per athlete; Enterprise unlimited. Rationale: Small tier is designed for small academies where single-parent households are the norm; split-family multi-guardian support adds meaningful UI complexity (whose email to CC, whose consent counts) that Small tenants don't need.
enforcedBy: AthleteGuardianObserver.creating refuses when live guardian count would exceed the per-tier cap: Small=1, Medium=4, Enterprise=unlimited
SDUI 'Add guardian' button hidden when features array does not include 'athlete_guardian.multi_guardian' + already has one guardian
PrimaryGuardianResolver treats the single guardian on Small as always primary (skips is_primary check)

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Enables the HR-verified workflow: new guardian rows land in verification_status='pending'; the auto-verify job attempts same-household detection first; when that fails, HR must upload a signed document (via storage::File) + invoke /verify to promote to verified. When off (Small + Medium), the auto-verify job runs but its fallback is silent-acceptance (24h TTL → verified without HR action). Enterprise adds the mandatory HR step + audit-ready document retention.
enforcedBy: AthleteGuardianObserver.updating on verification: when gate is on AND method='hr_manual', verification_document_file_id MUST be set (returns GUARDIAN_VERIFICATION_DOCUMENT_REQUIRED)
VerifyGuardianByEmailDomainJob: when gate off, fallback is silent-acceptance after 24h; when gate on, fallback is 'stays pending until HR acts'
GuardianController@verify refuses when gate is off (returns GUARDIAN_VERIFICATION_WORKFLOW_NOT_ENABLED — verification is silent-only on non-Enterprise)
SDUI HR-verify button + upload-document modal hidden when features array does not include 'athlete_guardian.verification_workflow'
